{{Quote|Pumav (Selonia) repeated as quadruped champion, also placing 7th in the biped race.|A HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Pumav''' was a [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] sprinter from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]]. In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], they won the [[Standard year/Legends|annually]]-hosted [[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]] race held on the world [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]. The [[22 BBY/Legends|next year]], Pumav placed first in the same competition's quadruped division and also finished seventh in the meet's biped race, which was reported on by [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]].

==Biography==
[[Homeworld/Legends|Hailing]] from<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="PM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]], Pumav was a [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] who lived during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Great Peace of the Republic|reign]], competing as a sprinter in competitions by racing on either two or four [[Limb/Legends|limbs]].<ref name="HNN" /> In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|sports/13418_1.html|New Galaxy's Fastest Hexaped}} is set on the date [[Great ReSynchronization|13:4:18]], which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. As the article establishes that Pumav won an iteration of the [[Standard year/Legends|annually]]-hosted [[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]] race one year before its publication, they must have been in the competition in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].</ref> the Selonian won the quadruped race in the prestigious [[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]] racing meet, held annually in the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Pyre Folas]] on<ref name="HNN" /> the world<ref name="SOL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref> [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]].<ref name="HNN" /> The [[22 BBY/Legends|next year]],<ref name="Date" /> Pumav repeated as the Mobquet Presents' quadruped champion and also finished seventh in the meet's biped race, losing to the [[Teek/Legends|Teek]] [[Yeep]], who easily outran Pumav and the rest of the competitors. The Selonian received a medal for the victory and later posed for a picture along with Yeep and the meet's hexaped race winner, [[Yopaxtul]]. The events of that [[Standard year/Legends|year's]] meet, including Pumav's participation, were reported on by an edition of [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Personality and traits==
Pumav had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and was covered in a mixture of black, white, and gray [[Hair/Legends|fur]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Skills and abilities==
The Selonian was skilled at racing on varying amounts of their limbs comparative to other biped and quadrupeds in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]<ref name="HNN" /> by 23 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].<ref name="Date" />

==Equipment==
In 22 BBY's<ref name="Date" /> Mobquet Presents meet, they wore a gray head covering, a reflective yellow visor over their eyes, a gray waist sash, and a brown [[Belt/Legends|belt]] with several pockets.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pumav appeared in "New Galaxy's Fastest Hexaped," an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #52]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[April 18]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN52 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
